limitations.impact: Results may not generalize to other hardware; no workstation/cluster validation
limitations.mitigation: Architecture is designed for constrained environments by intent

limitations.impact: Limits batch size, sequence length, model scale; no multi-GPU
limitations.mitigation: INT8 quantization partially mitigates; INT4 planned

limitations.impact: Sustained GPU compute may throttle; benchmark results may degrade under prolonged runs
No downstream task evaluation; no published perplexity or standard benchmarks
limitations.mitigation: Training path and infrastructure validated; scale is a resource question

limitations.impact: Mamba-style stability fix proven in one configuration; not a universal result
limitations.mitigation: Documented as engineering finding, not theoretical claim

limitations.description: INT8 performance not production-trustworthy for all configurations
limitations.impact: Small matrix speed benchmark below threshold; real benefit from batch size increase, not raw INT8 speed
limitations.mitigation: Correctness is strong; performance gap is documented and tracked

limitations.impact: Cannot support multi-user or regulated operations
limitations.mitigation: Acknowledged as missing; CRC integrity exists as foundation

limitations.impact: Distributed communication is plaintext; not suitable for sensitive data
limitations.mitigation: LTP provides transport/integrity only; security layer is future work

limitations.description: No artifact provenance or audit trail
limitations.impact: Cannot meet regulated or defense-grade operational requirements
limitations.mitigation: Checkpoint integrity exists at the storage level

limitations.description: Logos symbolic bridge is partially fragile
limitations.impact: Full daemon setup not turnkey; one sub-check soft-fails; not hardened for arbitrary use
limitations.mitigation: Validated in narrow scenarios; packaging is a known gap

limitations.impact: Vulkan backend not validated at same level as CUDA
limitations.mitigation: CPU path works on all hardware; GPU is additive

limitations.impact: No release date, beta timeline, or deployment schedule
limitations.mitigation: Project is framed as research platform, not product

limitations.impact: Some subsystems exercised only in narrow tests; no long-duration CI

limitations.description: All evidence is self-reported from private repository
limitations.mitigation: Evidence is reproducible in principle on equivalent hardware

summary: Sonata is a laboratory research platform with validated subsystems but significant hardware, security, and maturity limitations. These limitations are published alongside achievements as a credibility measure.
